cases.name: auth ownership
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase commonly models per-user access rules with @request.auth.id.

cases.name: body isset
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase exposes :isset modifiers for request body fields.

cases.name: missing auth context is denied by empty value
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase-style missing request auth values behave like empty strings in this safe subset.
